mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT c.host_id FROM certification_posts p JOIN challenge_participants cp ON cp.id = p.challenge_participant_id JOIN challenges c ON c.id = cp.challenge_id WHERE p.certification_status = 'PENDING' AND p.user_id != c.host_id AND p.deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT INTO user_warnings (user_id, reason, challenge_id, status) SELECT pending.host_id, 'AUTO_APPROVAL', pending.challenge_id, 'ACTIVE' FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT c.host_id, c.id AS challenge_id FROM certification_posts p JOIN challenge_participants cp ON cp.id = p.challenge_participant_id JOIN challenges c ON c.id = cp.challenge_id WHERE p.certification_status = 'PENDING' AND p.user_id != c.host_id AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.host_id = #{hostId} ) pending RETURNING user_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_warnings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT status FROM user_verifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY applied_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest WHERE latest.status = 'APPROVED' )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_verifications SET status = 'REVOKED' WHERE id = ( SELECT id FROM user_verifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY applied_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 )
UPDATE user_warnings SET status = 'RESOLVED' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
